tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientScopesIdScopeMappingsRealmComposite
tools.description: Get effective realm-level roles associated with the client’s scope   What this does is recurse  any composite roles associated with the client’s scope and adds the roles to this lists.

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappings
tools.description: Get all scope mappings for the client

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsClientsClient
tools.description: Get the roles associated with a client’s scope   Returns roles for the client.

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsClientsClientAvailable
tools.description: The available client-level roles   Returns the roles for the client that can be associated with the client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsClientsClientComposite
tools.description: Get effective client roles   Returns the roles for the client that are associated with the client’s scope.

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsRealm
tools.description: Get realm-level roles associated with the client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsRealmAvailable
tools.description: Get realm-level roles that are available to attach to this client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.getRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsRealmComposite
tools.description: Get effective realm-level roles associated with the client’s scope   What this does is recurse  any composite roles associated with the client’s scope and adds the roles to this lists.

tools.name: scopeMappings.postRealmClientScopesIdScopeMappingsClientsClient
tools.description: Add client-level roles to the client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.postRealmClientScopesIdScopeMappingsRealm
tools.description: Add a set of realm-level roles to the client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.postRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsClientsClient
tools.description: Add client-level roles to the client’s scope

tools.name: scopeMappings.postRealmClientsIdScopeMappingsRealm
tools.description: Add a set of realm-level roles to the client’s scope

tools.name: users.deleteRealmUsersId
tools.description: Delete the user

tools.name: users.deleteRealmUsersIdConsentsClient
tools.description: Revoke consent and offline tokens for particular client from user

tools.name: users.deleteRealmUsersIdCredentialsCredentialId
tools.description: Remove a credential for a user

tools.name: users.deleteRealmUsersIdFederatedIdentityProvider
tools.description: Remove a social login provider from user

tools.name: users.deleteRealmUsersIdGroupsGroupId
tools.description: DELETE /{realm}/users/{id}/groups/{groupId}

tools.name: users.getRealmUsers
tools.description: Get users   Returns a list of users, filtered according to query parameters

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersCount
tools.description: Returns the number of users that match the given criteria.

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersId
tools.description: Get representation of the user

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdConfiguredUserStorageCredentialTypes
tools.description: Return credential types, which are provided by the user storage where user is stored.

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdConsents
tools.description: Get consents granted by the user

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdCredentials
tools.description: GET /{realm}/users/{id}/credentials

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdFederatedIdentity
tools.description: Get social logins associated with the user

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdGroups
tools.description: GET /{realm}/users/{id}/groups

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdGroupsCount
tools.description: GET /{realm}/users/{id}/groups/count

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdOfflineSessionsClientId
tools.description: Get offline sessions associated with the user and client

tools.name: users.getRealmUsersIdSessions
tools.description: Get sessions associated with the user

tools.name: users.postRealmUsers
tools.description: Create a new user   Username must be unique.

tools.name: users.postRealmUsersIdCredentialsCredentialIdMoveAfterNewPreviousCredentialId
tools.description: Move a credential to a position behind another credential

tools.name: users.postRealmUsersIdCredentialsCredentialIdMoveToFirst
tools.description: Move a credential to a first position in the credentials list of the user

tools.name: users.postRealmUsersIdFederatedIdentityProvider
tools.description: Add a social login provider to the user

tools.name: users.postRealmUsersIdImpersonation
tools.description: Impersonate the user

tools.name: users.postRealmUsersIdLogout
tools.description: Remove all user sessions associated with the user   Also send notification to all clients that have an admin URL to invalidate the sessions for the particular user.

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersId
tools.description: Update the user

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdCredentialsCredentialIdUserLabel
tools.description: Update a credential label for a user

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdDisableCredentialTypes
tools.description: Disable all credentials for a user of a specific type

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdExecuteActionsEmail
tools.description: Send a update account email to the user   An email contains a link the user can click to perform a set of required actions.

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdGroupsGroupId
tools.description: PUT /{realm}/users/{id}/groups/{groupId}

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdResetPassword
tools.description: Set up a new password for the user.

tools.name: users.putRealmUsersIdSendVerifyEmail
tools.description: Send an email-verification email to the user   An email contains a link the user can click to verify their email address.

tools.name: userStorageProvider.getIdName
tools.description: Need this for admin console to display simple name of provider when displaying client detail   KEYCLOAK-4328

tools.name: userStorageProvider.getRealmUserStorageIdName
tools.description: Need this for admin console to display simple name of provider when displaying user detail   KEYCLOAK-4328

tools.name: userStorageProvider.postRealmUserStorageIdRemoveImportedUsers
tools.description: Remove imported users

tools.name: userStorageProvider.postRealmUserStorageIdSync
tools.description: Trigger sync of users   Action can be "triggerFullSync" or "triggerChangedUsersSync"

tools.name: userStorageProvider.postRealmUserStorageIdUnlinkUsers
tools.description: Unlink imported users from a storage provider

tools.name: userStorageProvider.postRealmUserStorageParentIdMappersIdSync
tools.description: Trigger sync of mapper data related to ldap mapper (roles, groups, …​)   direction is "fedToKeycloak" or "keycloakToFed"

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
